# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

export const config = {
  runtime: "edge",
};

type JsonRecord = Record<string, unknown>;

function isPlainObject(v: unknown): v is Record<string, unknown> {
  return typeof v === "object" && v !== null && !Array.isArray(v);
}

function toHeaderValue(v: unknown): string | null {
  if (v === null || v === undefined) return null;
  if (typeof v === "string") return v;
  if (typeof v === "number" || typeof v === "boolean" || typeof v === "bigint") return String(v);
  return null;
}

function sanitizeHeaders(input: unknown): Headers {
  const headers = new Headers();

  if (!isPlainObject(input)) return headers;

  for (const [rawKey, rawVal] of Object.entries(input)) {
    const key = String(rawKey).trim();
    if (!key) continue;

    const lower = key.toLowerCase();
    if (
      lower === "connection" ||
      lower === "content-length" ||
      lower === "transfer-encoding" ||
      lower === "host" ||
      lower === "keep-alive" ||
      lower === "proxy-connection" ||
      lower === "upgrade" ||
      lower === "te" ||
      lower === "trailer"
    ) {
      continue;
    }

    if (Array.isArray(rawVal)) {
      for (const item of rawVal) {
        const v = toHeaderValue(item);
        if (v !== null) headers.append(key, v);
      }
      continue;
    }

    const v = toHeaderValue(rawVal);
    if (v !== null) headers.set(key, v);
  }

  return headers;
}

function parseBodyContent(body: JsonRecord): string {
  const c = body.content;
  if (c === undefined || c === null) return "";
  if (typeof c === "string") return c;
  if (typeof c === "number" || typeof c === "boolean" || typeof c === "bigint") return String(c);
  if (isPlainObject(c) || Array.isArray(c)) return JSON.stringify(c);
  return String(c);
}

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  if (req.method !== "POST") {
    return new Response("Method Not Allowed", { status: 405 });
  }

  let body: JsonRecord = {};
  try {
    const ct = req.headers.get("content-type") || "";
    if (ct.includes("application/json")) {
      body = (await req.json()) as JsonRecord;
    } else {
      const text = await req.text();
      try {
        body = JSON.parse(text) as JsonRecord;
      } catch {
        body = { content: text };
      }
    }
  } catch {
    body = {};
  }

  const content = parseBodyContent(body);
  const userHeaders = sanitizeHeaders(body.headers);

  if (!userHeaders.has("content-type")) {
    userHeaders.set("content-type", "text/plain; charset=utf-8");
  }
  userHeaders.set("cache-control", userHeaders.get("cache-control") ?? "no-store");

  const encoder = new TextEncoder();
  const chunkSize = typeof body.chunkSize === "number" && body.chunkSize > 0 ? Math.floor(body.chunkSize) : 1024;
  const delayMs = typeof body.delayMs === "number" && body.delayMs >= 0 ? Math.floor(body.delayMs) : 0;

  const stream = new ReadableStream<Uint8Array>({
    async start(controller) {
      try {
        if (content.length === 0) {
          controller.close();
          return;
        }

        for (let i = 0; i < content.length; i += chunkSize) {
          const chunk = content.slice(i, i + chunkSize);
          controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(chunk));
          if (delayMs > 0) {
            await new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, delayMs));
          }
        }
        controller.close();
      } catch (e) {
        controller.error(e);
      }
    },
  });

  return new Response(stream, {
    status: typeof body.status === "number" ? body.status : 200,
    headers: userHeaders,
  });
}
